query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  COUNT(content_fingerprint) as rows_with_fingerprint,
  COUNT(creative_id) as rows_with_creative_id,
  MIN(date) as earliest_date,
  MAX(date) as latest_date
FROM ad_performance;

  COUNT(content_fingerprint) as rows_with_fingerprint,
  COUNT(creative_id) as rows_with_creative_id,
  MIN(date) as earliest_date,

FROM ad_performance;
